claim_text: The relative simplicity, cost, and robustness of our DMI implementation at the widely available scanner field strength of 3T is promising for the future clinical translation of this metabolic imaging technique,and is a crucialstep towards the translation of novel therapies targeting metabolic pathways in cancers5 .

sub_claims.text: The relative simplicity, cost, and robustness of our DMI implementation at the widely available scanner field strength of 3T is promising for the future clinical translation of this metabolic imaging technique,and is a crucialstep towards the translation of novel therapies targeting metabolic pathways in cancers5 .
sub_claims.nuance: Source PDF not fetched during Phase 2 (paywalled or not reachable under personal-only access).
